prompt: Compare average grades across course types for winter vs summer semesters

inputData.question: Compare average grades across course types for winter vs summer semesters

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Compare average grades across course types for winter vs summer semesters"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Compare average grades across course types for winter vs summer semesters"},"startedAt":1771804108493,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Join grades -> enrollments -> course_sections -> courses, filter to winter/summer semesters and compute average exam score and an average of available numeric components per grade, grouped by course_type and semester. Deterministic ordering by course_type then semester.","sql":"SELECT
  c.course_type::text AS course_type,
  cs.semester_type::text AS semester,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(
    (COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)) /
    NULLIF(
      (CASE WHEN g.exam_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
      (CASE WHEN g.project_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
      (CASE WHEN g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    , 0)
  )::numeric, 2) AS avg_component_average,
  COUNT(g.id) AS num_grades
FROM public.grades g
JOIN public.enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
WHERE lower(cs.semester_type::text) IN ('winter', 'summer')
GROUP BY c.course_type::text, cs.semester_type::text
ORDER BY c.course_type::text ASC, cs.semester_type::text ASC;","assumptions":["semester_type uses values like 'winter' and 'summer' (case-insensitive)","course_type is stored on courses and can be cast to text for grouping","exam_score, project_score, attendance_score are numeric and represent measurable components to average","component average is computed per-grade as the mean of the non-null numeric components, then those per-grade averages are averaged across the group","rows with no numeric components will be excluded from the component-average calculation (NULL)"]},"endedAt":1771804174656},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT
  c.course_type::text AS course_type,

FROM public.grades g

visualization.title: Average Grades by Course Type — Winter vs Summer

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT
  c.course_type::text AS course_type,
  cs.semester_type::text AS semester,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(
    (COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)) /
    NULLIF(
      (CASE WHEN g.exam_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
      (CASE WHEN g.project_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
      (CASE WHEN g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    , 0)
  )::numeric, 2) AS avg_component_average,
  COUNT(g.id) AS num_grades
FROM public.grades g
JOIN public.enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
WHERE lower(cs.semester_type::text) IN ('winter', 'summer')
GROUP BY c.course_type::text, cs.semester_type::text
ORDER BY c.course_type::text ASC, cs.semester_type::text ASC;

visualization.title: Average Grades by Course Type — Winter vs Summer

result.sql:
SELECT
  c.course_type::text AS course_type,
  cs.semester_type::text AS semester,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(
    (COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)) /
    NULLIF(
      (CASE WHEN g.exam_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
      (CASE WHEN g.project_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
      (CASE WHEN g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    , 0)
  )::numeric, 2) AS avg_component_average,
  COUNT(g.id) AS num_grades
FROM public.grades g
JOIN public.enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
WHERE lower(cs.semester_type::text) IN ('winter', 'summer')
GROUP BY c.course_type::text, cs.semester_type::text
ORDER BY c.course_type::text ASC, cs.semester_type::text ASC;
